prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion portrait of a beautiful young Pakistani woman standing gracefully in a luxurious heritage courtyard with Mughal-inspired architecture. She has long glossy black wavy hair worn over one shoulder, warm medium skin tone, and wears traditional gold jhumka earrings with a delicate necklace. Her face should be intentionally obscured with a soft square privacy blur centered over the facial area. Dress her in a white sleeveless embroidered Pakistani designer kurta with fine beige-gold threadwork, a keyhole neckline, ornate hem border, and matching beige embroidered trousers. Add a sheer embroidered dupatta draped over one forearm and flowing down both sides. The setting is an elegant sandstone courtyard with carved columns, scalloped arches, recessed archways, terracotta potted green plants, and warm sunlight creating soft shadows. Use shallow depth of field with the background slightly blurred, warm golden-hour tones, high-end editorial fashion photography, natural pose, realistic fabric texture, intricate embroidery detail, centered vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people, distorted hands, and overly stylized illustration.
